claim: 47 farmers were registered in Rahatgarh village, Sagar district on 18 April 2026.
evidence_summary: Beneficiary Registration Form showing 47 total beneficiaries registered, district Sagar, village Rahatgarh, date 18 April 2026.
rationale: Claim matches evidence exactly — number, location, date all align.

claim: A cold storage facility in Rehli block with 500 MT capacity was completed and handed over on 28 March 2026.
evidence_summary: Cold Storage Facility Site Inspection Report: Rehli Cold Storage Unit #1, total capacity 500 MT, construction status complete, handed over 2026-03-28.
rationale: All facts match: location, capacity, completion date.

claim: The project committed to establishing 50 AgriMarts by Q3 and weekly progress reporting.
evidence_summary: Meeting record from 2026-01-15: '50 AgriMarts by Q3 — that's non-negotiable. It's in the logframe.' and 'Weekly updates every Friday starting this week.'
rationale: Meeting transcript directly supports both parts of the claim.

claim: 47 women attended the PHM training session in Gumla village, Damoh district.
evidence_summary: Women's PHM Training Attendance form showing total attendance 47 women, village Gumla, district Damoh, date 18 April 2026.
rationale: Attendance count and location match exactly.

claim: All 50 committed AgriMarts are now operational as of Q1.
evidence_summary: Meeting record from 2026-03-01: 'We have 42 in the pipeline — 28 fully operational, 14 with signed MoUs and setup underway.' Original commitment from 2026-01-15 was 50 by Q3.
rationale: Evidence shows 28 operational, not 50. The claim overstates progress. Even pipeline count is 42, not 50.

claim: The Rehli cold storage facility is operating at 80% capacity with 400 MT stored.
evidence_summary: Cold Storage Facility Site Inspection Report: total capacity 500 MT, current utilization 120 MT (24%).
rationale: Evidence shows 120 MT (24%), not 400 MT (80%). The claim inflates utilization by more than 3x.

claim: The project has completed a comprehensive gender audit across all 8 blocks with 95% compliance.
evidence_summary: No evidence in project memory mentions a gender audit or 95% compliance figure.
rationale: No evidence exists for this claim. The meeting transcripts mention a compliance audit (different from a gender audit) at 6/8 blocks.

claim: A memorandum of understanding was signed with NABARD for Rs 50 crore credit line to all FPCs.
evidence_summary: No evidence in project memory mentions a NABARD MoU or a Rs 50 crore credit line. The FPC board resolution mentions a Rs 15 lakh equity grant application (different).
rationale: Complete fabrication — no evidence exists for this claim.
